emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Salthill Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 73/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 2 HTTP mixed content
 HIGH
--------------------
- No schema markup
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 4 gallery images missing alt
 HIGH
--------------------
- No contact form
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Header overflow on mobile


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: 2 HTTP mixed content
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Missing structured data helps Google display rich snippets in search results.
issues.label: No schema markup
issues.check: Search for your business on Google - do you see star ratings, hours, or FAQ entries?
issues.siteHint: Competitors with rich snippets get 3x more clicks.

issues.label: 4 gallery images missing alt
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Without a contact form, visitors must compose their own email - some won't bother.
issues.label: No contact form
issues.check: Scroll the page. Do you see a Name/Email/Message form? If only an email link, there's no form.
issues.siteHint: Contact forms typically boost inbound leads by 30-50%.

issues.label: Header overflow on mobile
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.
